hero.title: About ITICs Web.
hero.subtitle: A dedicated space for digital identity, development credits, and recognition of the people who build and maintain the web presence of ICT Engineering.

credits.title: Site credits
credits.subtitle: This site was created as an initiative to strengthen the digital identity of ICT Engineering at ITSOEH and communicate formation, projects, community, and admissions.

updating.title: Information being updated
updating.body: More profiles and contributions from the academic and technical community will be added soon.
